title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・光を浴びて

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I did it! I—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Riiice! You were aaaawesooome!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, yep! Here I am!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't be! We can't be here—this is the
winner's circle!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Only the winner and her team are allowed to
stand here!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, no problem detected. We are all
Team Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That was a superb race, Rice. You have my
congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
During your race, Rob Roy called you a tenacious
demon. My own observations found that name
quite fitting.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A tenacious demon?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Bourbon! I told you to keep that a secret!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I managed to live up to everyone's
expectations this race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! And you're smiling too! You better keep it
up for the winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We'll be there too, waving our arms until they fly
off!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thanks, Urara. I'll find you in the crowd...
and wave back.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A really... really big wave, so you'll see it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...That said, I'm way too nervous!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
To think I would take center stage at the spring
Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. As the runner who defeated me, you must
hold yourself with more dignity.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: M-McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Without a doubt, this stage is a special one. Yet
we are professionals when it comes to
performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is but one thing you must convey to all the
people who have come here to see you today...
and that is your gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: My... gratitude?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. On the stage, we Umamusume give thanks to
those who have supported us and pushed us
forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Put another way, the stage is not something to be
feared.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As the winner, it is an extension of your duty to
shine onstage for those who have lifted you up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Which is to say, I'm looking forward to seeing
how you shine after such an extraordinary race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Understood!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro McQueen heads to the stage
with elegance and grace.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... She's incredible.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I need to follow her example. I must meet
everyone's expectations in order to show how
grateful I am...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She's right, after all... Bourbon and the other
racers aren't the only reason I've gotten this far...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There are also all the people... who watch my
races and support me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: All right... Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower runs off toward the glittering stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later in the evening...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm sorry to bring this up when we just got
back, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've decided what I want to do next!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've decided what I want to do next!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... I want to live up to my fans' expectations
even more.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I saw so many lights while I was standing on the
stage.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't believe it... So many people made me
feel like a star.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So... if my fans will allow it, I want to compete in
the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen—a race in which only
fan-favorites can compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who would have thought this girl, who I once
found crying alone on campus, would now be
more than qualified for such a race?
choice_data_list: Then let's race in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Yep! I'm going to give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That should show everyone...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: How grateful I am.
